title: LCX8 P2-T06 People/HRX component/API action source trace
scope: Trace PeopleHome route wiring, legal People workspace, workforce directory, HR documents/leave/approvals/recruiting/policy/audit/analytics/AI/payroll/admin components, HRX runtime headers, admin permission API context, and source-visible guarded/unwired People/HRX actions. Home/Client/Matter rows that merely reference HRX APIs remain covered by P2-T02/P2-T03/P2-T04.

lazyweb_reference.use: Reference only; local People/HRX source/API trace drives classifications.

anchors.description: active section component routing and refreshKey propagation gaps
search input and type filter buttons
conflict/ethical-wall/reviewer receipt panels are display surfaces, not extra actions
workforce header actions including missing handlers
workforce row click only sets selectedEmployeeId and is not rendered on members route
employee row selection for documents/leave flows
documents read effect keyed by employeeId/refreshKey
document metadata table without body/source bytes action
leave form inputs and submit button
approval/audit read effects and resolve write handler
pipeline read and stage update handler
candidate portal is read-only and gated by candidateId
rendered panel has no visible action controls
policy list read and create policy handler
policy form inputs and submit button
analytics read effect; no visible actions
AI review read and advisory/final-decision request handlers
admin read effect and runAction wrapper
object manager tabs and field policy action
admin permission payload, context header, read/write runtime wrappers
complete/close handlers exist in source but current PeopleHome lifecycle route does not render LifecycleBoard

excluded_rows: LCX8-ACTION-0010, LCX8-ACTION-0014, LCX8-ACTION-0024, LCX8-ACTION-0038, LCX8-ACTION-0042: Home/Shell People navigation rows already traced in P2-T01/P2-T02
LCX8-ACTION-0036: Home command-center refresh probe already traced in P2-T02
LCX8-ACTION-0044 and LCX8-ACTION-0114: Matter/Client refresh rows that reference HRX backlink APIs remain covered by P2-T04/P2-T03
LifecycleBoard 완료/종료 source-only buttons are excluded because current PeopleHome #people-lifecycle renders PeopleWorkforceDirectory, not LifecycleBoard
CandidatePortal has no visible action controls on current PeopleHome recruiting route because candidateId is not wired from RecruitingPipeline selection
EmployeeProfile is imported but not rendered by current PeopleHome routes, so its source-only content is not counted as visible action surface

row_updates.label: 새로고침
row_updates.handler: PageHeader onClick -> setRefreshKey(key + 1); PeopleHome useEffect -> fetchHrxPeopleOverview -> fetchHrxEmployees; refreshKey is passed to LegalPeopleWorkspace, PeopleWorkforceDirectory, EmployeeList, HRDocumentWorkspace, and LeaveRequestPage only
row_updates.api_route: GET /api/hrx/employees; wired active sections also re-run GET /api/hrx/legal-people/search, GET /api/hrx/legal-people/:personId, GET /api/hrx/legal-people/relationships, GET /api/hrx/legal-people/ethics, GET /api/hrx/lifecycle/onboarding, GET /api/hrx/lifecycle/offboarding, GET /api/hrx/documents?employee_id=:employee_id, GET /api/hrx/leave?employee_id=:employee_id&policy_id=pto-us
row_updates.outcome: API/runtime-backed action remains BLOCKED pending P3/P4 proof

row_updates.label: People directory denied/review state
row_updates.handler: PeopleHome does not accept or forward liveCtx/ctx to LegalPeopleWorkspace; hrxApiClient uses fixed allow-style HRX runtime headers and cannot render ctx=denied/review People directory state from route params
row_updates.outcome: missing/no-effect/unwired behavior remains FAIL until remediated

row_updates.label: HRX audit step-up retry
row_updates.handler: fetchHrxAuditEvents returns kind === "step_up_required" -> render HrxStepUpChallenge; retry button onClick -> onRetry -> setRefreshKey(key + 1) -> fetchHrxAuditEvents()
row_updates.api_route: GET /api/hrx/audit with HRX step-up headers; conditional response body { step_up_required: true } renders retry state
row_updates.outcome: guarded/step-up state mapped; proof still required before launch claim

row_updates.label: People header refresh on standalone HRX panels
row_updates.handler: PageHeader onClick -> setRefreshKey(key + 1), but standalone HRX panels are rendered without refreshKey/onRefresh props, so active panel data does not re-fetch; only PeopleHome overview fetchHrxEmployees runs
row_updates.api_route: GET /api/hrx/employees only; missing refresh propagation to GET /api/hrx/approvals, GET /api/hrx/recruiting/pipeline, GET /api/hrx/policies, GET /api/hrx/audit, GET /api/hrx/analytics, GET /api/hrx/ai/reviews, POST/read payroll sequence state, and admin collection reads
row_updates.outcome: missing/no-effect/unwired behavior remains FAIL until remediated
